content_body:
Specializing in horseback rides for beginners, Cowgirl Up Stables is a family friendly horseback riding company nestled in the breath taking Blue Ridge Mountains. Cowgirl Up is an all-women owned and operated horseback riding company just 15 minutes from Downtown Blue Ridge. 

Perfect for families and children, explore the beautiful mountain scenery on horseback and create memories while on your Blue Ridge vacation.

For our guests staying at Creekside Green and Cohutta Sunset, this horseback riding outfitter is very close to your Blue Ridge cabin.
title: Cowgirl Up Stables
